{{Relic Infobox|Sword of Jade|2}}
{{R|Sword of Jade||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{R|Sword of Stone||2}} gotten from {{E|The Sunken Statue|2}} event.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from transforming the {{R|Sword of Stone||2}} gotten in the {{E|The Sunken Statue|2}} event by selecting {{Frame|Grab the Sword}}, then beating 5 Elites.
